descriptionShort: Profile of Matt Hervey, Moncton Hawks defenceman, who fled Los Angeles as a teenager to pursue hockey in Canada.
descriptionLong: Matt Hervey, a third-year defenceman with the Moncton Hawks, discusses his journey from a troubled home in Los Angeles to Langley, British Columbia, where he began his hockey career at age 15. The article explores how Hervey escaped a difficult situation and now works to raise awareness about the destructive effects of drugs and alcohol, with plans mentioned involving three teammates.

attribution.headline: Matt Hervey Profile: From Los Angeles to Hockey Career
